case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $5400.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $5400.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY DAVID HARRISON ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DANNY VAN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,400.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VAN, DANNY
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536
